questions.question: Explain the concept of a hypervisor and its role in creating a virtualized datacenter. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the function of a hypervisor and its impact on virtualization

questions.question: What is the primary function of a cloud layer 4 firewall in a virtualized datacenter? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the role of a cloud layer 4 firewall in network security

questions.question: Compare and contrast the advantages and disadvantages of using a virtual machine (VM) versus a container in a cloud-based environment. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the benefits and drawbacks of both VMs and containers in cloud computing
